name: codex-hud
description: Real-time terminal HUD for Codex CLI sessions: context, tools, todos, git status, and session activity at a glance.

interface.shortDescription: Terminal HUD for Codex CLI sessions
interface.longDescription: Codex HUD provides a Codex CLI-first terminal telemetry layer for model, reasoning effort, project, git, context, usage, tools, todos, and session signals. The first version ships as a standalone CLI with a Codex plugin wrapper for setup and future native statusline integration.
defaultPrompt: Use Codex HUD to inspect my current Codex CLI environment
Show me how to run codex-hud status
